acceptance_criteria: 1) Runtime tools execute subordinate LM calls from Python and enforce shared budget atomically. 2) Batched path dispatches concurrently and propagates structured errors. 3) Loop feedback includes accurate sub-LM remaining budget and call effects.
description: Finalize sub-LM tool integration (llm_query/llm_query_batched) through runtime, including async bridge correctness, retryable budget exhaustion behavior, and metadata accounting in feedback.
title: V4 slice: complete sub-LM tools runtime path
